---
title: "Frances Elizabeth Yonge"
---

## Frances Elizabeth Yonge

**Dates:** (21 May 1829-3 or 4  Dec 1893)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Youngest daughter of the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch, she seems to have been retarded following childhood measles [tomb Newton Ferrars church]

### Letters

- Letter from [December 1893]
- Letter from July 28th [1893?]
- Letter from July 27th 1876
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from September 20, 1869.
- Letter from July 25th [1863]
- Letter from Friday [17 March 1854]
- Letter from Oct 22d [1851[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from [?October ?November 1845]
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]
- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
